source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Given the sampled control system as shown in <image>, the open-loop pulse transfer function is \( G_0(z) = \frac{5\left(1 - \mathrm{e}^{-2 T}\right) z}{(z - 1)\left(z - \mathrm{e}^{-2 T}\right)} \). Determine the stability of the system when the sampling interval \( T = 1 \) second.

multi_step: requires substituting T=1 into the exponential term e^-2T
likely requires forming the closed-loop characteristic equation from the open-loop pulse transfer function using the shown control configuration

question provides a concrete transfer function and a fixed numerical sampling interval, enabling objective checking
